title: HyperLite - Extreme Performance
description: HyperLite is a minimalist Fabric modpack focused on extreme performance and lightness.
body:
**HyperLite** is a lightweight, high-performance Fabric modpack focused on speed, smooth gameplay, and minimal resource usage. It keeps the vanilla Minecraft experience intact while optimizing the game for both low-end PCs and modern systems.

📈 **Version 1.3 Highlights:**

_Updated to Minecraft 1.21.8_

Added **AppleSkin** 🍎 for better food management_

Added **Ksyxis** ⚡ for faster chunk loading and improved world performance

_Minor performance tweaks and optimizations for smoother gameplay_

🚀 **Why HyperLite?**

Optimized Rendering: Higher FPS and reduced visual lag

CPU & Logic Improvements: Faster game logic, AI, and physics

Network Efficiency: Lower latency for smoother multiplayer

Background Efficiency: Reduces CPU/GPU usage when idle or minimized

Stable & Smooth: Minimizes crashes, stutter, and lag spikes

Optional Enhancements: Reduces entity load and further smooths gameplay

🎯 **Who is it for?**

Players on low-end PCs seeking smooth, lag-free gameplay

Fans of vanilla Minecraft who want fast chunk loading and high FPS

Anyone looking for a ready-to-play, optimized modpack

HyperLite 1.3 keeps Minecraft light, fast, and efficient, letting you focus on playing, building, and exploring without compromise.
